title: Xtra Crispy Portuguese Chicken Roast
description: Indulgent Portuguese dish featuring charred and crispy chicken, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is nut-free-friendly and cooked to perfection in a copper mug.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together paprika, garlic powder, sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Rinse the chicken thighs and pat them dry with paper towels.
Brush the chicken thighs with olive oil and sprinkle with the paprika mixture.
Place the chicken thighs in a copper mug and roast in the oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, brush the chicken with lemon juice and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
